chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P No. D- 3282 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 14531/24 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2026. Mr. Tahir Mehmood, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Jam Khizzar, Advocate for Respondent No.6. Mr. Ahmed Raza Abbasi, APG. ********** The Petitioner has filed the instant Petition inter alia challenging the Pakistan Bar Council (“PBC”) and Sindh Bar Council (“SBC”) from recognizing LLB Degrees issued by Ziauddin University (Respondent No. 6). At the outset, the Counsel for the Petitioner was asked to show how he is an aggrieved person having any locus standi for filing of the instant Petition? to which he failed to provide any response. Counsel for the Petitioner was then asked to show if any persons who had obtained degrees from Ziauddin University had even been enrolled by the SBC or PBC in the recent past, again to which counsel failed to provide any response. Furthermore, when the counsel for the Petitioner was confronted with the fact that the Respondent No. 6 is said to be a recognized University and that the Petitioner has failed to show anything to the contrary, he (again) failed to submit any response. We further asked how the same could be challenged before this forum, as both the PBC and SBC have their own regulation mechanism(s), which are not under challenge? To which counsel continued to remain impaired in answering any of these (basic) questions. 2 This Petition is entirely frivolous in nature, and warrants no interference by this Court. Such Petitions need to be strongly discouraged, as they are filed without any merit and unduly block-up Court space.

To which counsel continued to remain impaired in answering any of these (basic) questions. 2 This Petition is entirely frivolous in nature, and warrants no interference by this Court. Such Petitions need to be strongly discouraged, as they are filed without any merit and unduly block-up Court space. Accordingly, the instant Petition stands dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE AYAZ
